creator: martin@lispworks.com
text:
(In reply to Michael from comment #20)
> I haven't just repelled setting boot_verbose=1, I tried it before and did it
> again to not giving any wrong answer, it didn't come anything else about the
> partitions as we saw already

Please check again for all messages containing GEOM_PART.  Because it printed "GEOM_PART: integrity check failed" I think it must have also printed something else before that.
